_comment: Restaurant scenarios. Replace __TAG_ID_xxx__ with actual tag IDs after creating tags.

scenarios.name: 友だち追加シナリオ（初回クーポン）
scenarios.description: 友だち追加直後にウェルカムメッセージとクーポン配信

steps.messageContent: {"type":"bubble","hero":{"type":"image","url":"__RESTAURANT_IMAGE_URL__","size":"full","aspectRatio":"20:13"},"body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"友だち追加ありがとうございます!","weight":"bold","size":"lg","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"__RESTAURANT_NAME__です。\n初回限定クーポンをプレゼント!","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"separator","margin":"lg"},{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","margin":"lg","backgroundColor":"#FEF3C7","cornerRadius":"md","paddingAll":"16px","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"初回限定クーポン","weight":"bold","size":"md","color":"#B45309"},{"type":"text","text":"__COUPON_DETAIL__","size":"lg","weight":"bold","color":"#D97706","margin":"sm"},{"type":"text","text":"有効期限: __COUPON_EXPIRY__","size":"xs","color":"#92400E","margin":"sm"}]}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","spacing":"sm","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"予約する","text":"予約する"},"style":"primary","color":"#EF4444"},{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"メニューを見る","text":"メニューを見る"},"style":"secondary"}]}}

こんにちは、__RESTAURANT_NAME__です!

クーポンはもうお使いいただけましたか?
有効期限が近づいていますので、お早めにどうぞ!

「予約する」と送っていただければ、ご予約をお取りします。

scenarios.name: 来店後フォロー（リピート促進）
scenarios.description: 来店タグ付与後にお礼+次回クーポン。リピーター育成

steps.messageContent:
本日はご来店ありがとうございました!

__RESTAURANT_NAME__をお楽しみいただけましたでしょうか?

またのご来店をお待ちしております!

{"type":"bubble","body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"またお会いできるのを楽しみにしています!","weight":"bold","size":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"次回ご来店時にお使いいただけるクーポンです。","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","margin":"lg","backgroundColor":"#DBEAFE","cornerRadius":"md","paddingAll":"16px","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"リピーター特典","weight":"bold","size":"sm","color":"#1E40AF"},{"type":"text","text":"__REPEAT_COUPON_DETAIL__","size":"lg","weight":"bold","color":"#2563EB","margin":"sm"}]}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"予約する","text":"予約する"},"style":"primary","color":"#EF4444"}]}}

__RESTAURANT_NAME__です。

しばらくお会いできていませんね。

季節限定メニューが登場しました!
ぜひまた遊びにいらしてください。

「予約する」と送っていただければご予約をお取りします。

scenarios.name: 誕生日メッセージ
scenarios.description: 誕生日登録済みタグの友だちに誕生日シナリオ起動。リマインダと併用推奨

steps.messageContent:
誕生日の登録ありがとうございます!
誕生日が近づいたら、特別なプレゼントをお届けしますね!
